gpu: AMD Radeon RX 6800 (radeonsi, navi21, LLVM 19.1.7, DRM 3.61, 6.14.4-arch1-1)
notes: Switch to the Proton testing branch, otherwise the game will always crash
title: SCP: Nine-Tailed Fox

notes: Of course obviously the game itself could be broken -- it's an SCP mod usually you expect that to happen. I've tried every Proton version I have on deck from Proton 6, experimental, and GE-Proton-10-9. Always crashed without startup with Memory Access Violation. Go figure. Might try my luck with a Bottles environment because I got multiple SCP CB mods working there. Very disappointing. The mod is abandoned anyways (as of writing nearly a year of silence and no updates) so don't expect nothing from the dev side of things. Download the mod off ModDB.
title: SCP: Nine-Tailed Fox

notes: Very playable, with the right config
title: SCP: Nine-Tailed Fox
